examples: Snow geese are very gregarious birds.
Production of the foie gras pt involves force-feeding geese and ducks so that their livers swell.

The estate is surrounded by lush green gardens full of native Mexican plants, geese and peacocks.
This week, with European Union approval, France began vaccinating geese and ducks in the south-west.
